chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No. 760 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection No.22 and 25 2. For hearing of main case 3. For orders on CMA No.3361/2024 03.10.2025 Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for the applicant Ms. Saadia Sheeraz, Collector JIAP, Airports Karachi, is present in court pursuant to order dated 02.10.2025 and states that Special Customs Reference Application is not pressed. Order accordingly. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969 Judge Judge Amjad
